steps.title: Recognize the operation blocking p
steps.content: The equation shows $p + 34 = q + r$. The value 34 is added to $p$, blocking it from being isolated. To solve for $p$, subtract 34 from both sides.

steps.title: Subtract 34 from both sides
steps.content:
Applying this operation:

$$p + 34 - 34 = q + r - 34$$

$$p = q + r - 34$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
